title: aster lyallii
intro: Aster lyallii, also known as New Zealand astelia or Lyall's aster, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aster lyallii include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as acting as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
